response.original_title: Dive and the illicit Persuits for Happiness
response.overview: A UNIVERSAL STORY THAT HASN'T BEEN TOLD  The full 4 years of high school for the current generation  A group of friends about to enter high school  O decide to make a bucket list of all the things they want to do before they graduate, using it as an opportunity to push their comfort zones before going off to college.  Along the way, they navigate the challenges of adolescence, substance abuse, and the journey to establish personal agency for themselves, and their futures.
response.title: Dive and the illicit Persuits for Happiness
